scope.summary: Army Camp staff/division command recommendations now include an inferred enemy composition forecast from the current mandatory battle context.
scope.mobileQa: skipped: mobile is no longer a current target

observed.contextExample: 東方辺境防衛線 / 塹壕 / 敵圧42 / 危険78% / 主敵群集+銃兵+突破体
initialRecommendationExamples: 工兵主任をシュタインへ変更 改善+72 / 威信-4
工兵主任をクルーガーへ変更 改善+54 / 威信-4
第2師団師団長をアルンハイムへ変更 改善+101 / 威信-6
observed.afterApplyRecommendationExample: 兵站主任をフォスへ変更 改善+34 / 威信-5

implemented: Added enemy composition threat types and forecast helper to command recommendation context.
Recommendation context labels now include main enemy forecast.
Staff recommendation scoring now weighs roles against mob, riflemen, brute, and undead-officer threats.
Division commander scoring now adjusts morale, control, reserve, directive, and trait value against inferred enemy composition.
Army Camp passes inferred enemy threats from the current mandatory battle sector context.
deferred: True strategic intel field on StrategicOperation rather than inferred forecast.
Enemy composition forecast display on Theater/Deployment briefing.
Political backlash and loyalty events after repeated command reshuffles.
